description: Slide layout definitions for Slide Designer 3.0 - derived from Beautiful.ai reference decks

layouts.name: Title Hero
layouts.description: Full-screen title slide with centered headline and optional subtitle
layouts.use_case: Opening slides, section dividers, impact statements

layouts.name: Title with Background Image
layouts.description: Hero title with full-bleed background image and overlay

layouts.name: Split Content (50/50)
layouts.description: Two-column layout for text+image or text+text

layouts.name: Split Content Reverse (Image Left)
layouts.description: Two-column layout with image on left, text on right

layouts.name: Three Column Grid
layouts.description: Three equal columns for features, comparisons, or icon+text blocks
layouts.use_case: Feature lists, pricing tiers, service offerings, process steps

layouts.name: Four Grid (2x2)
layouts.description: 2x2 grid for four equal items with icons or images
layouts.use_case: Feature grids, capabilities, team members, product benefits

layouts.name: Text Only
layouts.description: Title and body text, no media

layouts.name: Single Chart
layouts.description: One chart with title and optional insights

layouts.name: Team Grid
layouts.description: Team member photos with names and titles
layouts.use_case: Team introductions, about us, organization charts

layouts.name: Logo Grid
layouts.use_case: Client logos, partner showcase, press mentions

layouts.name: CTA / Closing
layouts.use_case: Final slide, contact info, next steps
